title: Add restart buttons to dashboard service table

log.context: Add restart buttons to dashboard service table

Done. Here's what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/index.html`:

- **CSS**: Added `.svc-restart-btn` styles — small, monospace, dark-themed button with a subtle border that highlights on hover and turns amber while restarting.
- **Table header**: Added an empty `<th>` at the end of the header row for the action column.
- **Row builder**: Added a `<td>` with a `↺` button per row. Each button uses an IIFE to capture `svc.name` cleanly in the closure, then:
